meeting_notes.note: Integration mapping for onboarding exceptions is 80% complete. Two edge cases remain around joint accounts and missing tax identifiers.
Client operations lead approved the draft exception categories but asked for clearer ownership on escalated onboarding cases.
Data access for the historical exception sample is delayed pending security approval.

project_notes: Completed first pass of future-state onboarding workflow map.
Prepared architecture review packet for May 28 milestone.
Validated that client-facing updates need engagement-owner review before distribution.
Confirmed that no real client PII should be used in the prototype demo.

risk_log.risk: Security approval delay may reduce time available for architecture review validation.
risk_log.mitigation: Use masked sample records for prototype walkthrough and escalate access decision by May 24.

risk_log.risk: Exception ownership model may be unclear for branch operations users.
risk_log.mitigation: Add RACI review to next client working session.

decisions_needed: Confirm whether masked historical exceptions can be used for the architecture review.
Approve the exception ownership model before the May 28 milestone.
stakeholder_updates: Operations sponsor wants the weekly update to distinguish workflow progress from data-access risk.
Architecture lead wants decision owners listed explicitly.
